description: Built Pac-Man game from spec. Full 28x31 tile maze, 4 ghosts with distinct AI (Blinky=direct chase, Pinky=4-ahead ambush, Inky=midpoint flank, Clyde=shy retreat), scatter/chase mode cycling with 8-phase timer, power pellets triggering frightened mode with escalating ghost scores (200/400/800/1600), eaten ghost eyes returning to house, fruit bonus, cornering input buffer, tunnel wrapping, progressive levels with 3 speed tiers, extra life at 10K, high score via localStorage. Canvas 600x400, all constants named.

verification.browser_test: Game loads, maze renders with blue walls and dots, Pac-Man and ghosts visible, no JS errors, score/lives/level HUD displayed

self_check: All acceptance criteria verified: game loads without JS errors, canvas renders at 600x400, arrow keys respond, maze/dots/ghosts render, score displays, game over state works, restart works, no hardcoded localhost.
next: All 6 pipeline games now built. Next cycle: improve existing game or start new research.
